map-server.geocode.description: map-server geocode: Search for places using OpenStreetMap. Returns coordinates and bounding boxes for up to 5 matches. query

map-server.show_map.description: map-server show_map: Display an interactive world map zoomed to a specific bounding box. Use the GeoCode tool to find the bounding box of a location. west south east north label

mcp-server-chart.generate_area_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_area_chart: Generate a area chart to show data trends under continuous independent variables and observe the overall data trend, such as, displacement = velocity (average or instantaneous) × time: s = v × t. If the x-axis is time (t) and the y-axis is velocity (v) at each moment, an area chart allows you to observe the trend of velocity over time and infer the distance traveled by the area's size. data stack style theme width height title axisXTitle axisYTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_bar_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_bar_chart: Generate a horizontal bar chart to show data for numerical comparisons among different categories, such as, comparing categorical data and for horizontal comparisons. data group stack style theme width height title axisXTitle axisYTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_boxplot_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_boxplot_chart: Generate a boxplot chart to show data for statistical summaries among different categories, such as, comparing the distribution of data points across categories. data style theme width height title axisXTitle axisYTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_column_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_column_chart: Generate a column chart, which are best for comparing categorical data, such as, when values are close, column charts are preferable because our eyes are better at judging height than other visual elements like area or angles. data group stack style theme width height title axisXTitle axisYTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_district_map.description: mcp-server-chart generate_district_map: Generates regional distribution maps, which are usually used to show the administrative divisions and coverage of a dataset. It is not suitable for showing the distribution of specific locations, such as urban administrative divisions, GDP distribution maps of provinces and cities across the country, etc. This tool is limited to generating data maps within China. title data width height

mcp-server-chart.generate_dual_axes_char.description: mcp-server-chart generate_dual_axes_chart: Generate a dual axes chart which is a combination chart that integrates two different chart types, typically combining a bar chart with a line chart to display both the trend and comparison of data, such as, the trend of sales and profit over time. categories series style theme width height title axisXTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_fishbone_diagr.description: mcp-server-chart generate_fishbone_diagram: Generate a fishbone diagram chart to uses a fish skeleton, like structure to display the causes or effects of a core problem, with the problem as the fish head and the causes/effects as the fish bones. It suits problems that can be split into multiple related factors. data style theme width height

mcp-server-chart.generate_flow_diagram.description: mcp-server-chart generate_flow_diagram: Generate a flow diagram chart to show the steps and decision points of a process or system, such as, scenarios requiring linear process presentation. data style theme width height

mcp-server-chart.generate_funnel_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_funnel_chart: Generate a funnel chart to visualize the progressive reduction of data as it passes through stages, such as, the conversion rates of users from visiting a website to completing a purchase. data style theme width height title

mcp-server-chart.generate_histogram_char.description: mcp-server-chart generate_histogram_chart: Generate a histogram chart to show the frequency of data points within a certain range. It can observe data distribution, such as, normal and skewed distributions, and identify data concentration areas and extreme points. data binNumber style theme width height title axisXTitle axisYTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_line_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_line_chart: Generate a line chart to show trends over time, such as, the ratio of Apple computer sales to Apple's profits changed from 2000 to 2016. data style theme width height title axisXTitle axisYTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_liquid_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_liquid_chart: Generate a liquid chart to visualize a single value as a percentage, such as, the current occupancy rate of a reservoir or the completion percentage of a project. percent shape style theme width height title

mcp-server-chart.generate_mind_map.description: mcp-server-chart generate_mind_map: Generate a mind map chart to organizes and presents information in a hierarchical structure with branches radiating from a central topic, such as, a diagram showing the relationship between a main topic and its subtopics. data style theme width height

mcp-server-chart.generate_network_graph.description: mcp-server-chart generate_network_graph: Generate a network graph chart to show relationships (edges) between entities (nodes), such as, relationships between people in social networks. data style theme width height

mcp-server-chart.generate_organization_c.description: mcp-server-chart generate_organization_chart: Generate an organization chart to visualize the hierarchical structure of an organization, such as, a diagram showing the relationship between a CEO and their direct reports. data orient style theme width height

mcp-server-chart.generate_path_map.description: mcp-server-chart generate_path_map: Generate a route map to display the user's planned route, such as travel guide routes. title data width height

mcp-server-chart.generate_pie_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_pie_chart: Generate a pie chart to show the proportion of parts, such as, market share and budget allocation. data innerRadius style theme width height title

mcp-server-chart.generate_pin_map.description: mcp-server-chart generate_pin_map: Generate a point map to display the location and distribution of point data on the map, such as the location distribution of attractions, hospitals, supermarkets, etc. title data markerPopup width height

mcp-server-chart.generate_radar_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_radar_chart: Generate a radar chart to display multidimensional data (four dimensions or more), such as, evaluate Huawei and Apple phones in terms of five dimensions: ease of use, functionality, camera, benchmark scores, and battery life. data style theme width height title

mcp-server-chart.generate_sankey_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_sankey_chart: Generate a sankey chart to visualize the flow of data between different stages or categories, such as, the user journey from landing on a page to completing a purchase. data nodeAlign style theme width height title

mcp-server-chart.generate_scatter_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_scatter_chart: Generate a scatter chart to show the relationship between two variables, helps discover their relationship or trends, such as, the strength of correlation, data distribution patterns. data style theme width height title axisXTitle axisYTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_spreadsheet.description: mcp-server-chart generate_spreadsheet: Generate a spreadsheet or pivot table for displaying tabular data. When 'rows' or 'values' fields are provided, it renders as a pivot table (cross-tabulation); otherwise, it renders as a regular table. Useful for displaying structured data, comparing values across categories, and creating data summaries. data rows columns values theme width height

mcp-server-chart.generate_treemap_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_treemap_chart: Generate a treemap chart to display hierarchical data and can intuitively show comparisons between items at the same level, such as, show disk space usage with treemap. data style theme width height title

mcp-server-chart.generate_venn_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_venn_chart: Generate a Venn diagram to visualize the relationships between different sets, showing how they intersect and overlap, such as the commonalities and differences between various groups. data style theme width height title

mcp-server-chart.generate_violin_chart.description: mcp-server-chart generate_violin_chart: Generate a violin chart to show data for statistical summaries among different categories, such as, comparing the distribution of data points across categories. data style theme width height title axisXTitle axisYTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_waterfall_char.description: mcp-server-chart generate_waterfall_chart: Generate a waterfall chart to visualize the cumulative effect of sequentially introduced positive or negative values, such as showing how an initial value is affected by a series of intermediate positive or negative values leading to a final result. Waterfall charts are ideal for financial analysis, budget tracking, profit and loss statements, and understanding the composition of changes over time or categories. data style theme width height title axisXTitle axisYTitle

mcp-server-chart.generate_word_cloud_cha.description: mcp-server-chart generate_word_cloud_chart: Generate a word cloud chart to show word frequency or weight through text size variation, such as, analyzing common words in social media, reviews, or feedback. data style theme width height title
